subcodes.title: Words spoken at home of Aqa Siyyid Ali Afnan in Akka, 1914-04-22
subcodes.first_line: In the neighborhood of Baghdad there lived a man and a Bahá'í by the name of Mohamad, the 'thorn-picker'. He lived about 21 miles away from the city.
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
